scripts.dev: echo '→ Use: pnpm dev:web  |  pnpm dev:api'
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.test:api: cd apps/api && uv run --extra dev pytest
scripts.verify: cd apps/web && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm test && cd ../api && uv run --extra dev pytest
